name: @hia-doc/hia-tsdoc-workspace
description: Workspace for HIA TypeScript/TSDoc documentation packages.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check scripts/check-skeleton.cjs && node --check scripts/check-license-audit.cjs && node --check scripts/release-check.cjs && node --check scripts/build-fixtures.cjs && node --check scripts/check-fixtures.cjs && node --check packages/tsdoc-spec/src/index.mjs && node --check packages/ts-doc-extractor/src/index.mjs && node --check packages/ts-doc-adapter/src/index.mjs && node --check packages/ts-to-js-doc-source-map/src/index.mjs && node --check packages/ts-jsdoc-bridge/src/index.mjs
scripts.release:gate: npm run check:syntax && npm run build:fixtures && npm run check:skeleton && npm run check:fixtures && npm run license:audit && npm test && npm run release:check && npm pack --dry-run --json
